title: A Bloodline Marked for Death
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Hajrudin, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A certain sea- Roger's ship, the pro Jackson

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Captain!! Captain Roger!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: - In the age of legendary pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard shakey opened up a place on pirate Island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They say it's unbelievable!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We worried we'd never see her again when she quit being empress...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But now we know where she is, let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Doesn't rocks control pirate island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Say, Rayleigh, is it just me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...or has Roger Been in a Bad Mood Ever since you two spoke in his quarters?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ERR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What did you discuss?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't gonna say anything to the crew, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I figured I should talk to you one on one, Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was this during our last fight with the Kula Pirates, just before she quit?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shakuyaku did seem off back then... like she was sick or something.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I worried she stepped down because of her health.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you're telling me she gave you this during that battle?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah, I was speechless...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This can only be described as a "love letter"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Come and make me yours.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: -Shakuyaku

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And you're not interested?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd be lying if I said that; I just don't wanna be tied down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, I do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: C'mon, men!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I ain't giving up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh? You're energetic all of a sudden, Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pirates live to plunder! And we don't stop...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'Til the prize is claimed! Ain't that right, fellas?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is he still talking about Shaky?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gotta be! Why else would we go to rocks' island of all places?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Everyone's got an equal chance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's go and get her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: MARK! I'm hungry! Make food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's already done, dig in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WOOOW!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
